front.title: Security Evaluation Benchmark for AI Agents

abstract.t: This document defines a security evaluation benchmark framework for AI agents. It is divided into two parts: evaluation metrics and evaluation methodology, comprising four first-level evaluation dimensions and 55 second-level metrics, as well as a comprehensive evaluation methodology system covering all scenarios, including static evaluation, dynamic evaluation, attack-defense evaluation, compliance evaluation, and quantitative evaluation. It aims to assess the risk profile of AI agents throughout their entire lifecycle, including perception risks, memory risks, decision-making risks, and execution risks.
